metric: Clean legal article records - audit dataset
interpretation: All cleaned legal records are retained for auditability, including legal variants such as repeated articles.
Represents the official numeric sequence of Saudi Labor Law articles.

metric: Legal repeated numeric labels kept as variants
interpretation: Repeated numeric labels are preserved because legal labels such as 'مكرر' represent valid legal variants, not duplicate rows.

metric: Active legal articles allowed for RAG
interpretation: Only active legal articles are allowed inside the RAG indexing knowledge base.
Repealed legal articles are retained for transparency but excluded from retrieval indexing.
